items.summary: Return Ayla's rescued lunchbox instead of selling it. She remembers whose it was.
items.dialogue: Ayla: Gin-uli mo gid? Salamat, ha — indi tanan nga daan basura.

items.summary: Hand the worn rosary back to Nang Shine rather than selling it. A small grace passes between you.
items.dialogue: Nang Shine: Ay, ang rosaryo ni Lola. Salamat, anak. Pagapadayaw ka sang Mahal nga Birhen.

items.summary: Give the brass oil lamp back to Nong Lave's workshop instead of selling it. He nods, approving the restraint.
items.dialogue: Nong Lave: Gin-uli mo, indi gin-baligya. Maayo nga kamot, maayo nga hunahuna.
